info.title: Vectis HTTP API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for the shipped Vectis v1 HTTP API. Authentication can be disabled for local deployments; protected operations document bearer-token security because that is the production posture.

get.summary: Read API Prometheus metrics when the metrics handler is enabled
Read API build and cell version information
Check API connectivity to the log service
Read cron schedule health and backlog state
Read source-mode capabilities and declaration summaries

patch.summary: Enable or disable a source-backed schedule

delete.summary: Delete a stale disabled source-backed schedule

put.summary: Set a temporary source schedule override

get.summary: List source-backed schedules for a repository
Get a source repository job definition

put.summary: Commit a source repository job definition

get.summary: List runs for a source repository job
Stream logs for a source repository job run
Stream run events for a source repository job
Read cell ingress, dispatch, and catalog status
Stream run updates for a job
Get the frozen run definition snapshot
Read the captured execution payload for operator repair

post.summary: Repair a run by marking it succeeded
Repair a run by marking it failed
Repair a run by marking it cancelled
Repair a run by marking it abandoned
Repair a run by requeueing it
Force a run back to queued
Complete initial setup and create the first admin

201.description: Token created. The raw token appears only in this response.

JobDefinition.description: Vectis job definition. See Job Definition Validation for the detailed authoring contract.

namespace.description: Namespace path for source-backed job create/update routes. Direct /api/v1/jobs/run requests may omit this field or set it to /ephemeral.
